story.text: bdo asked what else needs healing. loop.heal named three stale-park over-bites (field-topology.v0, gates-enumerated.v1, gates-enumerated.v2): a gate correctly negated an OLD version, the LIVE version then PASSED the same gate, but the old refusal still surfaced as a live park on the owner's inbox -- confirmed at session start, loop.node inbox showed atom.field-topology.v0 parked while its v1 was confirmed. The cause is precise and the fix is small: gaps, digest, pull, and field all already filter superseded versions through the canonical reconcile.superseded_atom_ids (done-line 0056), but loop/node.py inbox was the one owner surface that never did. The fix adds that same canonical filter to inbox (no second truth, I-4): a version a higher sibling replaces is history, not live work, so it no longer surfaces as an open owner park -- its parked receipt stands on the log untouched. The teeth (section 10): a NON-superseded park still surfaces, so the filter is not a blanket hide. Value is the owner's: bdo's inbox stops showing phantom parks for work already healed in a later version, so the daily owner surface tells the truth about what is actually live. Sibling of the settle-on-main road (done-line 0133): that drained the inflight accounting for LANDED work; this drains the stale-park surfacing for SUPERSEDED work -- both make a dead-pipeline version stop masquerading as live.
